rationale: Ukraine reclaiming territory and doubling logistics strikes is a qualitative continuation of last cycle's uptick — no new escalation toward Poland; Iran deal noise has no direct Polish impact.

top_events.title: Ukraine reclaims territory, doubles attacks on Russian logistics
top_events.summary: Ukraine's continued battlefield gains are positive for Polish border security, but this is a continuation of last cycle's noted uptick — no new qualitative shift warranting a score increase.

top_events.title: Trump accuses Iran of leaking fake deal terms
top_events.summary: Iran-US nuclear talks remain in public disarray; prolonged stalemate keeps global energy uncertainty elevated, with mild indirect effect on Polish energy costs.

top_events.title: SpaceX IPO debuts, Musk becomes first trillionaire
top_events.summary: Major financial market event with potential ripple effects on EU markets and Polish pension funds, though direct impact on daily Polish life remains limited.
